For the belt running from Sector 108 through Sector 115 on Mohali's southern expansion edge, that moment is now underway."}],["$","p","1",{"style":{"color":"rgba(var(--fg-rgb),0.55)","fontSize":"16px","lineHeight":1.95,"marginBottom":"20px"},"children":"This corridor sits at the meeting point of three forces: the Chandigarh International Airport catchment, the planned expansion of Mohali's sector grid beyond the IT City belt, and township development by national players — including Emaar's presence in Sectors 108–109, where our own showroom at Thakral Towers is located."}]]]}],["$","div","1",{"style":{"marginBottom":"48px"},"children":["$L4",["$L5","$L6","$L7"]]}],"$L8","$L9"],"$La"]}]}],"$Lb"]}],["$Lc"],"$Ld"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"LghCujBhQvVI82ObHh2G8"}
4:["$","h2",null,{"style":{"color":"var(--fg)","fontSize":"clamp(20px, 2.5vw, 26px)","fontWeight":600,"letterSpacing":"-0.5px","lineHeight":1.3,"marginBottom":"24px"},"children":[["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"var(--accent)","marginRight":"12px"},"children":"◈"}],"What is actually driving demand"]}]
5:["$","p","0",{"style":{"color":"rgba(var(--fg-rgb),0.55)","fontSize":"16px","lineHeight":1.95,"marginBottom":"20px"},"children":"First, connectivity. The corridor plugs directly into the airport road network and the Kharar–Landran road, which puts both the airport and the IT City employment belt within a short drive. Land value in the Tricity has always followed road-width and connectivity before anything else, and this belt scores on both."}]
6:["$","p","1",{"style":{"color":"rgba(var(--fg-rgb),0.55)","fontSize":"16px","lineHeight":1.95,"marginBottom":"20px"},"children":"Second, the supply picture. Unlike older sectors where inventory is fragmented and resale-driven, much of this belt consists of planned township plots with clear layouts, wider internal roads, and modern infrastructure — the kind of product NRI buyers and end-users increasingly insist on."}]
7:["$","p","2",{"style":{"color":"rgba(var(--fg-rgb),0.55)","fontSize":"16px","lineHeight":1.95,"marginBottom":"20px"},"children":"Third, the price ladder. Established sectors closer to Chandigarh have already re-rated. Buyers priced out of those markets are moving outward along the corridor, and that migration of demand is the classic engine of appreciation in this region."}]
8:["$","div","2",{"style":{"marginBottom":"48px"},"children":[["$","h2",null,{"style":{"color":"var(--fg)","fontSize":"clamp(20px, 2.5vw, 26px)","fontWeight":600,"letterSpacing":"-0.5px","lineHeight":1.3,"marginBottom":"24px"},"children":[["$","span",null,{"style":{"color":"var(--accent)","marginRight":"12px"},"children":"◈"}],"What to verify before you buy"]}],[["$","p","0",{"style":{"color":"rgba(var(--fg-rgb),0.55)","fontSize":"16px","lineHeight":1.95,"marginBottom":"20px"},"children":"None of this removes the need for diligence. In this belt specifically, we verify three things on every transaction: that the plot sits inside an approved layout with clear GMADA or competent-authority sanction, that the title chain is clean and the seller's possession is undisputed, and that the specific pocket has functioning access roads today — not just on the master plan."}],["$","p","1",{"style":{"color":"rgba(var(--fg-rgb),0.55)","fontSize":"16px","lineHeight":1.95,"marginBottom":"20px"},"children":"The gap between a good buy and a stuck investment in an expanding corridor is almost always one of these three checks. This is precisely the work we do before any property reaches a client."}]]]}]
